title: Tickets Tab Enhancement
description: Enhance the Tickets tab to provide comprehensive ticket management with filtering capabilities, including complete ticket lists (including archived/completed), relevant agent information, and filter controls.

tickets.title: Create data sync script
tickets.description: Create script to parse COMPANY_ROSTER.md JSON and generate stories.json and tickets.json files for dashboard consumption.

tickets.title: Create archived tickets data source
tickets.description: Define schema and create data source for archived tickets with completion metadata.

tickets.title: Create custom hooks for ticket data
tickets.description: Implement React hooks for ticket data fetching (useTickets), filtering (useTicketFilters), and archived tickets (useArchivedTickets).

tickets.title: Design filter controls component
tickets.description: Create responsive filter controls with status multi-select, agent dropdown, search input, and archive toggle.

tickets.title: Enhance TaskCard component
tickets.description: Improve TaskCard to show assignee role/specialization, story context, and archived/completed visual indicators.

tickets.title: Create TicketStats overview component
tickets.description: Build stats overview showing status distribution, agent workload, and active vs archived count.

tickets.title: Implement status filtering
tickets.description: Add multi-select status filter with URL state synchronization.

tickets.title: Implement agent filtering
tickets.description: Add agent filter dropdown with status indicators and cross-reference with live agent status.

tickets.title: Implement search functionality
tickets.description: Add debounced search across ticket title and description with text highlighting.

tickets.title: Implement archive toggle
tickets.description: Add toggle to show/hide archived tickets with visual distinction.

tickets.title: Unit tests for filter hooks
tickets.description: Write comprehensive unit tests for all filter-related hooks including edge cases.

tickets.title: E2E tests for tickets tab
tickets.description: Write Playwright E2E tests for complete filter workflow, search, mobile responsiveness.

tickets.title: Accessibility audit
tickets.description: Ensure accessibility compliance for all new components (keyboard nav, screen reader, contrast).

tickets.title: Update documentation
tickets.description: Document all new components, hooks, data flows, and filter usage examples.

tickets.title: Code review preparation
tickets.description: Prepare code for final review with performance metrics, bundle size check, and self-review checklist.
